subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Bismillah
subcodes.first_line: ...The names of God derive from those attributes which are the perfections belonging to the reality of the Essence
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی بفیض ظهوره الاعلی کشف الغطاء عن وجه الهدی و اشرقت الارض
subcodes.subjects: @names and attributes of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
